title: Pillars of a Data Integrity Programme
alt: Four pillars of a data integrity programme: governance, risk assessment, controls and review

items.label: Governance
items.desc: Management-owned policy, clear ownership and review

items.label: Risk Assessment
items.desc: Map data flows, prioritise by impact and detectability

items.label: Layered Controls
items.desc: Technical, procedural and behavioural controls combined

items.label: Review & Sustain
items.desc: Audit trail review, self-inspection and change control
